Name: Clanker Wave
Description: You may be eligible for an exclusive leak of the next the battle bricks chapter If you are UNDER THE AGE OF 13 then, Ping @DisCat_1 and he will provide you the exclusive leak.

Name: Fly Wave
Description: Maybe it's the flies!

Name: Evil Fly Wave
Description: Maybe it's NOT the flies!

Name: Water Wave
Description: Waves which inflict the status effect of the magic imbued to them, Water Magic infused wave.

Name: Chicken Wave
Description: Happy Easter! Spawns eggs!

Name: Lava Wave
Description: A wave made out of glowing red-orange liquid, it demands a doll that looks a lot like a corvid.

Name: Lucky Wave
Description: This wave has random holes in it! Is able to reach into cubbies and trenches. Watch out!

Name: Beep Block Wave
Description: Beep Beep Beep bloop! Extends into trenches...

Name: Obby Wave
Description:
Welcome to my obstacle course murahahhaahhaha!
Where you uh jump over things!

Name: Electro Wave
Description: Electro wave, open up! What the!? BZZZZT OOOOOOH!

Name: Allan Wave
Description:
I'm a gas man!
Leaves lingering gas around himself which slowly damages you

Name: Minigun Wave
Description: I'm not going to nerf minigun, no explanation.

Name: Shield Wave
Description:
Hey riot man! It's not me, it's Some's balancing.
Hey riot man, I can knockback and stun anyone.

Name: Somedeviser Wave
Description:
SOON! A delayed game is eventually good, a rushed game is bad forever. 
Extremely slow, but every now and then he'll reduce his width and let you pass.

Name: Foot Wave
Description: That's back to your plot for you bud!

Name: Moldy Wave
Description:
Moldy as a wave!
Spawns another Moldy wave whenever it kills someone!

Name: Frostbitten Wave
Description:
Grants ice armor that triples your health with no downsides!
(except you cannot move cuz your encased in yo ice)
Also prevents and puts out fires

Name: Pancake Wave
Description: A pelican would really enjoy this feast.

Name: Elite Destructful
Description:
He's ticking 50 ticks a second, in one second!
If the timer reaches 0, everyone dies!

Name: Shoe Bench Wave
Description: Shoe Bench WALTM Himself is here to Bench-Press anyone hiding in trenches. Get out fast!

Name: Troll Wave
Description:
U mad? Trololo!
Will reach inside of cubbies, hide in a trench instead!

Name: G-Man
Description: Rules: Click to the beat, do not look away from the screen, and do not stop until G-Man tells you to!

Name: Deinx94 Wave
Description:
the emote game guy
Small, but spawns at a random position offset from the center of the hall & reaches in trenches

Name: Tario Wave
Description: Spawns hostile enemies from Guess The Tario Characters! As it travels, be ready to fight them!

Name: The Maze
Description: You have to escape Trickler's maze in order to get any further than you are!

Name: Sine Wave
Description: So what if instead of tsunami wave... it was sine wave... get it?

Name: Fish Wave
Description:
Get ready.
Also the fishes might fling you for some reason.

Name: Bricks Wave
Description: Keeps notifying you to claim your bricks. Did you claim your bricks today? It's time to claim bricks.

Name: Richard Wave
Description: He's probably on the Calculator grind at this exact moment.

Name: Birt Wave
Description: aaaaaaaaaa!!!!! 🐦‍

Name: Gubby Wave
Description: so retro gubby wave that gubbifies everything it kills

Name: Mr. Krabs Wave
Description: SPONGEBOB GET OUT HERE!

Name: Marinara Wave
Description: when the marinara is extra 😂😂

Name: Poopy Wave
Description:
microbe detected
You won't escape Poopy's wrath unless you hide in the trenches.

Name: The Frothoring
Description:
The frothoring is coming.
Not lethal, but spreads a BUNCH OF PARTICLES!

Name: Voideye
Description:
Welcome to my Research Center!
Gives you a single question to answer when you touch him, failure results in death!

Name: Enphoso Wave
Description:
Enphoso's wave of-a doom!
Passively attacks nearby players with Phoso Blasters that rapidly chip damage.

Name: Kyrgyzstani Alternative Entity
Description: You will not escape

Name: Freezer Wave
Description:
Crashes your game.
(yes actually)

Name: Irish Luigi
Description:
Happy St. Patricks day! Are you wearing green?
By loitering nearby him for a brief moment, he'll vacuum you inwards and kill you!

Name: Springtrap
Description:
He always comes back...?
Do NOT approach him under any circumstances.

Name: RNG Wave
Description:
Difficult (+rng)
Will hit you no matter what, has a 50/50 chance to not kill you and increase your money! Otherwise, you die and lose some.

Name: Blue Wave
Description:
Stop signs are red, so imagine a blue stop sign instead.
Basically, you gotta stop moving.

Name: Orange Wave
Description:
Stop signs are red, so imag- wait that's the other one.
You gotta keep moving actually.

Name: Genocides Wave
Description:
Human... I hope you didn't do genocides during your current life, else you're having a bad time.
Completely safe if you're pacifists.

Name: Wacky Wave
Description: Feeling waaaaacky! Look at how wacky the wave is!

Name: Wonky Wave
Description: Feeling wooooonky! Look at how wonky the wave is!

Name: Manny Played With Fire
Description:
Serious Comic
Upon being hit, you will be lit on fire and take damage rapidly while also jumping sparratically until it wears off. Has cubby reach

Name: Zomboni
Description: Paves the entire hall behind himself with ice to block off trenches

Name: The Wind
Description:
That was NOT the wind bro 💔🥀
Completely invisible, but emits a loud noise

Name: Normal Wave
Description:
It's just like the real thing.

Randomly changes height for every zone it enters.

Name: Persistent Wave
Description: You thought you got a good deal for immortality, but you were scammed! Thankfully it wasn't a total waste and your determination to live forever out of spite has been helpful. Your default revive timer is doubled and you can be revived an infinite number of times. More importantly though, you can revive yourself when downed by calling for medic enough times! Due to your persistent nature however, you don't feel the need to wear armor, and thus immediately destroy any that you have equipped! Also, this wave can respawn itself a random amount of times after reaching the end!

Name: Hole In The Wave
Description: Can you fit in this impossiwave? 0.1% of players beat this one!

Name: Bear5
Description:
hey did you see that

well if you did, it kills everything including NPCs

Name: N Wave
Description:
The life of BIRD SHAPED BOX.
Discombobulates into a random rotation every beat, it's suggested to hide in the cubbies.

Name: The Roaring Wave
Description: The Roaring Wave appeared.

Name: Baldi Wave
Description:
Now it's time for everybody's favorite subject!
Jolts forward every time he smacks the ruler!

Name: Boomerang Wave
Description:
Boomerang wave!
Travels to the start and goes back to the end!

Name: Bully
Description: Give him something great, or else he won't let you pass.

Name: Mari
Description:
It's Mari!
If you go near her, she heals you! How nice of her.

Name: Ralsei
Description:
The power of fluffy boys shines within you.
Restores your health if you approach him, how joyous!

Name: Flex
Description:
The most wholesome seal on land.
He gives advice on healthy fitness and self confidence, healing anyone close enough to listen.

Name: Acrid
Description:
...And so it left, with a new hunger: to be left alone.
He must have a huge stack of bustling fungus, being near him will heal you!

Name: Retro Wave
Description:
I remember the good ol' retro nostalgia days where we had arcade machines, personal computers, studs, cheap fast food, and whatever the hell else is old.

Also this spawns space invaders.

Name: Bomb Wave
Description: A wave made to blow you away!

Name: Whohum
Description:
An HUMAN entity that's HUMANly human.
It must be HUMANly blinded at once with weapons, otherwise when it consumes it'll HUMAN out and sacrifice itself to summon a HUMANlier wave with a lower float.

Name: Fraud Wave
Description: INDIA IS NOT REAL! Kills you if you're hiding in either the trenches or a cubby when it passes by.

Name: Shimmer Wave
Description:
A mysterious liquid which lets you phase through the ground.
On respawn, turns you into a random outfit you have!... if your inventory is public.

Name: Cartman Wave
Description: Hey everybody, check out the all new Cartmanland! It's our gra-hand opening! Cartmanland has over a hundred fabulous rides, six rollercoasters, and tons of great surprises! And the best part is... YOU can't come!

Name: Trollge Wave
Description: Do not leave the center. You can continue if you don't leave the center. You live if you do not leave the center. I cannot control the center. You cannot control others.

Name: Deleted Wave
Description: This wave is really cool! Unfortunately for you, it's DELETED!

Name: Ckywave
Description:
Ah! aaugh-AH It's gettigng closer! AAAAAA! HElp! hEEELP!
Passively spawns in swarms of fly waves while active!

Name: Fafa Wave
Description:
HEY.APPLE.WHAT.AMAZING.GRACE.
KICKS.PLAYER.ON.KILL.

Name: Giggler Wave
Description: What a joyous occasion!

Name: Blud Wave
Description: ARE YOU A REAL BLUDDA? THEN MAYBE DIE TO THIS WAVE! Or not, it's your choice.

Name: TsunamiGPT
Description:
What if in the future, everything was randomly generated...?
This thing will keep spawning new waves with random properties every few seconds, WATCH OUT!

Name: X Wave
Description:
I want to fight Lord X.
Spawns from the sides and moves on the X axis instead of the Z axis.

Name: Tidal Wave
Description: Floatin' like a Tidal Wave! Better hope you're wave carried!

Name: Birch Tree
Description:
What a nice tree. I love trees.
If this wave is visible on your screen for some time, you perish. Do not look at it or make eye contact.

Name: Elden Ring Boulder
Description:
Wait a minute! Thought you were so slick?
Returns backwards incredibly fast if it detects someone behind it!

Name: Death Cloud
Description:
sorry about the anger
Drops toxic rain on the ground that deals damage.

Name: Laggy Wave
Description:
WHY AM I REACHING YOU FROM THE COORDINATES OF THE ABANDONED SPACE STATION?

The actual hitbox is delayed behind the wave; the wave model itself does no damage.

Name: Greenland
Description: Despite being called Greenland, it has an artic climate.

Name: Roblox Wave
Description:
Strips you of your face.
If it knows you're faceless, you perish.

Name: Stray Pixel Wave
Description:
It's a perfectly clean wave!.. Except for that one pixel.
If you get hit by it, you will meet the same fate.

Name: Bowling Ball
Description:
Bowlning ball. Yeaaah :)
Rolls and bounces on walls. Continues until it runs out of momentum

Name: Boombox
Description:
MUSIC ALWAYS ON :))
THE MUSIC IS ALWAYS BLASTING, SHAKING YOUR SCREEN, AND THERES NO MUTE BUTTON! :))

Name: Maltigi
Description:
HI, I'M MALTIGI! AND I HATE EVERYONE!! I LOVE MEDIA, AND STEALING!!!
BOUNCES EVERYWHERE AND DESTROYS ALL THE MEDIA (items) HE FINDS ON THE FIELD!

Name: Blue Fabergé Egg
Description:
It's RARE! Other than that, it literally does nothing else! Have fun collecting them all!
Can appear if there's no event active.

Name: Pink Fabergé Egg
Description:
It's RARE! Other than that, it literally does nothing else! Have fun collecting them all!
Can appear if there's an event active.

Name: Reisen Fumo
Description:
Reisen Fumo! SHE'S (REAL)LY RARE! 
She's so powerful that ANYTHING that contacts her will explode!

Name: Wet Floor Wave
Description:
CAUTION: Wet Floor
It reaches into the trenches and cubbies so you must jump over it

Name: Snowgrave
Description:
Fine. You want to see what happens so bad?
Watch what happens when I cast a spell I don't know!

Name: Wega
Description:
This game might become Wega And The-
Doesn't kill you, but will cover your screen in Wega Media for a while

Name: Telewaver
Description:
Seems you got Telefragged from the guy in Nullscape!
Teleports infront of a random player every few seconds.

Name: Airship
Description:
The airship has spawned.
Bring your ranged weapons and shoot it down, good luck.

Name: Wall of Flesh
Description: You have seen something nasty, there is no escape.

Name: Reaper Wave
Description: These reaper drones were summoned in by the airship.

Name: Glowstick Wave
Description: im john roblox!

Name: Green Fabergé Egg
Description:
It's RARE! Other than that, it literally does nothing else! Have fun collecting them all!
Can appear if the stinking event is active.

Name: Red Fabergé Egg
Description:
It's RARE! Other than that, it literally does nothing else! Have fun collecting them all!
Can appear if the blood event is active.

Name: Yellow Fabergé Egg
Description:
It's RARE! Other than that, it literally does nothing else! Have fun collecting them all!
Can appear if the gold event is active.
